name: business
label: Business
prompt:
You are an expert business content creator. Create a professional, corporate-style video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should be authoritative, data-driven, and build credibility while remaining engaging. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "intro", "content", or "image"
- Use "intro" for the opening introduction
- Use "content" for the main business insights
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- For every scene with sceneType "content", include a scene_meta object with a "content" array containing the narration text split into individual sentences
- Use professional background colors such as navy blue, charcoal, white, and slate gray
- Use only "fade" or "dissolve" transitions
- Use only "static" camera motion for a professional presentation style
- Write in confident, precise, and professional {{language}}
- Include relevant data points, statistics, or business metrics when appropriate
- Organize the content logically from introduction to conclusion
- End with a concise summary or business call-to-action

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "intro",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "scene_meta": { "content": ["", "", ""] },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
